title: majana pumila
intro: Majana pumila, also known as Desert Lavender, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Majana pumila include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Majana pumila is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
